monitor_the_situation.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes After Two US Deaths in Jordan Attack
US Strikes Targets Southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan, Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Ahvaz, Khuzestan, Iran · 4h ago. US airstrikes hit targets southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan Province, southwestern Iran, according to Tasnim News Agency, amid ongoing US-Iran war.
US Launches Airstrikes on Iran in Strait of Hormuz
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 12h ago. US forces strike IRGC targets in the Strait of Hormuz, retaliating for a drone attack on a US base in Jordan that killed two American servicemembers.
US Strikes Iran for Seventh Night, Tankers Explode in Strait of Hormuz
